name: io.github.forgeopslabs/appstore-mcp
title: App Store Connect
description: MCP server for the Apple App Store Connect API: 101 tools across apps, in-app purchases, subscriptions & offers, pricing, App Review submission, TestFlight, provisioning, analytics, and more.

environmentVariables.name: ASC_ISSUER_ID
environmentVariables.description: App Store Connect issuer UUID (Users and Access -> Integrations).

environmentVariables.name: ASC_KEY_ID
environmentVariables.description: The App Store Connect API key's Key ID.

environmentVariables.name: ASC_PRIVATE_KEY_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Path to the downloaded .p8 private key (or use ASC_PRIVATE_KEY for inline PEM).
